mission.title: Install and Configure Trickster on Kubernetes
mission.description: Trickster is an open-source HTTP reverse proxy/cache designed to accelerate time series dashboard queries and improve the performance of HTTP applications. Installing Trickster allows you to enhance your application's response times and caching capabilities.

steps.title: Deploy Trickster with kubectl
steps.description:
Deploy Trickster as a reverse proxy cache for Prometheus:
```bash
kubectl create namespace trickster
kubectl apply -n trickster -f - << 'EOF'
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: trickster
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: trickster
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: trickster
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: trickster
        image: trickstercache/trickster:2.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8480
        - containerPort: 8481
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: trickster
spec:
  selector:
    app: trickster
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 8480
    targetPort: 8480
  - name: metrics
    port: 8481
    targetPort: 8481
EOF
```

steps.title: Configure Trickster for Prometheus
steps.description:
Create a ConfigMap with Trickster configuration:
```bash
kubectl apply -n trickster -f - << 'EOF'
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: trickster-config
data:
  trickster.yaml: |
    backends:
      prometheus:
        provider: prometheus
        origin_url: http://prometheus.monitoring:9090
        cache_name: default
    caches:
      default:
        provider: memory
EOF
```

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n trickster
kubectl port-forward svc/trickster -n trickster 8480:8480
curl http://localhost:8480/health
```

resolution.summary: Trickster is deployed as a reverse proxy cache for Prometheus/time-series backends.

upgrade.title: Update the image version
upgrade.description:
```bash
kubectl set image deployment/trickster trickster=trickstercache/trickster:2.0 -n trickster
kubectl rollout status deployment/trickster -n trickster
```

troubleshooting.title: Trickster not caching
troubleshooting.description:
Check the Trickster logs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app=trickster -n trickster
```
Verify the origin URL is reachable from the pod.

troubleshooting.title: High latency on first request
troubleshooting.description: First requests are cache misses. Subsequent requests for the same time range will be cached.

troubleshooting.title: Metrics not available
troubleshooting.description:
Trickster exposes Prometheus metrics on port 8481:
```bash
curl http://localhost:8481/metrics
```

prerequisites.description: You need a Kubernetes cluster and Helm installed on your local machine.
